property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files (x86)\VMware\VMware Workstation\bin\;C:\Program Files\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Program Files\Python313\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\MinGW\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.4\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\Windows Performance Toolkit\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Utilities 1.6\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Users\Ali Bakhtiari\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Ali Bakhtiari\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\Ali Bakhtiari\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2023.3.4\bin;;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2023.3.1\bin;;C:\dart-sdk\bin;C:\flutter\flutter\bin;C:\modeltech64_2020.4\win64;C:\modeltech64_10.6d\win64;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2025.2.3\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\DataGrip 2025.2\bin;.

testcase.name: processFile_handlesMixOfValidAndInvalidLines
